mapper.sql: uasl_reservation_id, route_deviation_rate, route_deviation_amount, route_deviation_time, uasl_administrator_id, operator_id, uasl_id, aircraft_info_id, route_deviation_coordinates
mapper.select:
SELECT deviation.uasl_reservation_id, deviation.uasl_id, deviation.uasl_administrator_id,
deviation.route_deviation_rate, deviation.route_deviation_amount, deviation.route_deviation_time, deviation.operator_id, deviation.route_deviation_coordinates, deviation.aircraft_info_id FROM t_uasl_deviation as deviation JOIN t_uasl_reservation as reservation ON (deviation.uasl_reservation_id = reservation.uasl_reservation_id) WHERE reservation.end_at BETWEEN #{startAt} AND #{endAt}
mapper.insert:
insert into t_uasl_deviation ( uasl_reservation_id, route_deviation_rate, route_deviation_amount, route_deviation_time, uasl_administrator_id, operator_id, uasl_id, serial_number, registration_id, utm_id, specific_session_id, aircraft_info_id, route_deviation_coordinates ) values
( #{item.uaslReservationId,jdbcType=VARCHAR}, #{item.routeDeviationRate,jdbcType=DOUBLE}, #{item.routeDeviationAmount,jdbcType=VARCHAR}, #{item.routeDeviationTime}::jsonb, #{item.uaslAdministratorId,jdbcType=VARCHAR}, #{item.operatorId,jdbcType=VARCHAR}, #{item.uaslId,jdbcType=VARCHAR}, #{item.serialNumber,jdbcType=VARCHAR}, #{item.registrationId,jdbcType=VARCHAR}, #{item.utmId,jdbcType=VARCHAR}, #{item.specificSessionId,jdbcType=VARCHAR}, #{item.aircraftInfoId,jdbcType=INTEGER}, #{item.routeDeviationCoordinates}::jsonb )
mapper.select:
SELECT uasl_reservation_id, route_deviation_rate, route_deviation_amount, route_deviation_time, uasl_administrator_id, operator_id, uasl_id, route_deviation_coordinates, serial_number, registration_id, utm_id, specific_session_id FROM t_uasl_deviation WHERE
uasl_administrator_id = #{uaslAdministratorId, jdbcType=VARCHAR} AND
operator_id = #{operatorId, jdbcType=VARCHAR} AND
uasl_id = #{uaslId, jdbcType=VARCHAR} AND
EXISTS (select 1 FROM v_uasl_design_area_info_section WHERE v_uasl_design_area_info_section.uasl_id = t_uasl_deviation.uasl_id and ST_Intersects(v_uasl_design_area_info_section.geometry, ST_GeomFromText(#{coordinates, jdbcType=VARCHAR}, 4326) ) ) and
t_uasl_deviation.uasl_reservation_id IN ( SELECT t_uasl_reservation.uasl_reservation_id FROM t_uasl_reservation WHERE end_at BETWEEN #{startAt,jdbcType=TIMESTAMP} AND #{endAt,jdbcType=TIMESTAMP} )
